prompt: Edit image 1 by placing the progress bar from image 2 beneath the circular gauge in the preview area. In the left component library of image 1, replace the existing radio button with the purple radio button from image 3.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. In the UI preview area, place the green progress bar from image 2 directly beneath the circular gauge. In the 'QML Types' section within the left component library, replace the existing grey outline 'Radio Button' element with the purple-filled radio button from image 3.
objects: UI preview area with a circular gauge
Green progress bar (beneath the circular gauge in the UI preview area)
'QML Types' section (within the left component library)
Purple-filled radio button (replacing the existing radio button in 'QML Types' section)
Grey outline 'Radio Button' element (should not be present)
Top toolbar with file path and dimensions
Side menu (Welcome, Edit, Design, Debug, Projects)
